purpose: Home base for coding agents working across Eddie's local repos.
current_focus: Integrate AI-driven Alternative Data Engine in JustFactor using Kimi LLM API with local rule-based fallback.

last_checkpoint.summary: Completed LLM integration for Alternative Data Engine in JustFactor backend. The engine queries Kimi LLM (via RamClouds proxy) using a brace-free format to score digital legitimacy, reputation risk, and operating activity, with a robust fallback to local rule-based evaluations when APIs timeout or fail. Removed the masothue.com scraping as it represents KYC rather than alternative data.

rules: This workspace is the coding-agent home.
Project repos are target work sites.
Keep project-specific source and docs in the target repo.
Keep shared skills/plugins/commands under .agents as canonical source.
Use .codex and .claude as runtime adapters, not canonical memory.
Do not store secrets or generated media.
When editing an existing file, never delete and recreate it; always perform edits in-place within the current file.
